title: Access main dashboard and verify top metrics are displayed
description: Verifies an authenticated user can land on the main dashboard and see high-level KPI/metric content.

title: From main dashboard, use Comercial quick link to reach Comercial dashboard
description: Verifies the Comercial quick link on the main dashboard routes the user to the Comercial module and shows KPI content there.

title: From main dashboard, use Operacional quick link to reach Operacional dashboard
description: Verifies the Operacional quick link on the main dashboard routes the user to the Operacional module.

title: From main dashboard, use Financeiro quick link to reach Financeiro dashboard
description: Verifies the Financeiro quick link on the main dashboard routes the user to the Financeiro module.

title: From main dashboard, use Administrativo quick link to reach Administrativo dashboard
description: Verifies the Administrativo quick link on the main dashboard routes the user to the Administrativo module.

title: Main dashboard displays module entry points consistently after page content loads
description: Verifies that after landing on the main dashboard, the user can see the module entry points (quick links) without missing content.

steps.description: Wait for the dashboard content to appear

title: Login required: user can reach main dashboard only after successful sign-in
description: Verifies the login gate for the authenticated landing page by confirming a successful login leads to the main dashboard.

title: Open Comercial dashboard and view the sales pipeline Kanban
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can access the Comercial module and see the sales pipeline Kanban board.

steps.description: Click "Comercial" in the main navigation menu

title: Open a lead card and view lead details modal
description: Verifies that a user can open a lead/opportunity card from the Kanban and see the lead detail modal.

steps.description: Click "Comercial" in the main navigation menu
Click on a lead card in the sales pipeline Kanban

title: Move a lead card to the Negotiation stage and confirm stage updates
description: Verifies that a user can move an opportunity to the "Negotiation" column and that the UI reflects the updated stage.

steps.description: Click "Comercial" in the main navigation menu

title: Create Lead form shows validation error when email is missing
description: Verifies that attempting to save a new lead without a required email shows a validation error and keeps the user on the form.

steps.description: Click "Comercial" in the main navigation menu
Type "Test Lead" into the name field
Verify text "Email is required" is visible

title: Create Lead validation keeps user on the create form after error
description: Verifies that after a required-field validation error, the create lead form remains open and does not navigate away.

steps.description: Click "Comercial" in the main navigation menu

title: Cancel/close lead details modal returns to Kanban view
description: Verifies that closing the lead detail modal returns focus to the Kanban view without leaving the Comercial page.

steps.description: Click "Comercial" in the main navigation menu
Click on a lead card in the sales pipeline Kanban
Verify element "Lead details" is not visible

title: Create a new income transaction (Receita) and see it listed
description: Verifies a user can create a new 'Receita' transaction and it appears in the transactions list.

steps.description: Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu

title: Negative amount validation prevents transaction creation
description: Verifies entering a negative amount shows a validation error and the transaction is not created.

steps.description: Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu

title: Transactions list is visible on Financeiro page
description: Verifies the Financeiro page displays a transactions list area for financial visibility.

steps.description: Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu

title: Financeiro KPI/dashboard elements are visible
description: Verifies key financial visibility widgets (KPIs/dashboard) are present on the Financeiro page.

steps.description: Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu

title: Cancel/close new transaction form does not create a transaction
description: Verifies abandoning the new transaction flow does not create a transaction entry.

steps.description: Click "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "New Transaction" is not visible

title: Create a new task from Operacional Kanban and see it in the To Do column
description: Verifies a user can create a new task from the Operacional Kanban and that it appears in the To Do column after creation.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu

title: Create a new task with title and collaborator assignment
description: Verifies the New Task flow allows entering a title, assigning a collaborator, and creating the task successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Type "E2E Task - Kanban" into the title field

title: Complete task creation and verify it appears in To Do
description: Verifies submitting the New Task form creates the task and shows it in the To Do column on the Kanban board.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Type "E2E Task - To Do" into the title field
Select "First available collaborator" from the collaborator dropdown
Verify text "E2E Task - To Do" is visible

title: Validate New Task form requires a title
description: Verifies the New Task form prevents creation when title is missing and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Open Delivery Radar from Operacional and see overdue/upcoming sections
description: Verifies the Delivery Radar view can be opened from Operacional and displays deadline-related content.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu

title: Open an overdue task from Delivery Radar and view task detail
description: Verifies clicking an overdue task in Delivery Radar opens a task detail view with visible task information.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first task shown under "Overdue"

title: Attempt to change status without permission and see permission denied
description: Verifies a user without permission cannot change a task status from the task detail view and sees a permission denied message.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first task shown under "Overdue"

title: Cancel New Task creation and ensure no new task is added
description: Verifies closing/canceling the New Task dialog does not create a task and returns the user to the Kanban view.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Type "E2E Task - Cancel" into the title field
Verify text "E2E Task - Cancel" is not visible

title: Create a new internal demand and verify it appears in the 'Scheduled' column
description: Verifies a user can create a new Demand from Administrativo and see it listed under the Scheduled status.

steps.description: Click "Administrativo" in the main navigation menu
Type "Demand - UI test" into the title field
Type "Created during end-to-end UI test." into the description field
Verify text "Demand - UI test" is visible

title: Demand creation requires a title (validation blocks submission)
description: Verifies the Demand form validates required fields and does not create a demand when the title is missing.

steps.description: Click "Administrativo" in the main navigation menu
Type "Description without title" into the description field
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Demand creation requires a description (validation blocks submission)
description: Verifies the Demand form validates required fields and does not create a demand when the description is missing.

steps.description: Click "Administrativo" in the main navigation menu
Type "Demand missing description" into the title field
Verify text "Description is required" is visible

title: Create a new meeting with empty date and verify inline validation error
description: Verifies meeting creation blocks saving when the date field is empty and keeps the user on the meeting form.

steps.description: Click "Administrativo" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "Date is required" is visible

title: Meeting creation requires a title (validation blocks saving)
description: Verifies the Meeting form validates required fields (title) and shows an error when missing.

steps.description: Click "Administrativo" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Create a meeting successfully and verify it appears under 'Scheduled'
description: Verifies a user can create a Meeting and see it listed in the Scheduled status on the Administrativo board.

steps.description: Click "Administrativo" in the main navigation menu
Type "Meeting - UI test" into the title field
Verify text "Meeting - UI test" is visible

title: Open Directory from Dashboard and view a client profile with subscriptions
description: Verifies a user can open the Directory from the main dashboard, select a client, and view the client profile including subscriptions information.

steps.description: Verify a client list/table is visible

title: Select a client from Directory list and confirm profile page shows subscriptions section
description: Verifies that selecting a client from the Directory list opens the client profile and shows a subscriptions overview section.

steps.description: Click the first client in the client list

title: Delete client flow shows confirmation modal before deletion
description: Verifies that attempting to delete a client always prompts a confirmation modal before any deletion occurs.

steps.description: Click the first client in the client list

title: Cancel client deletion from confirmation modal keeps client accessible
description: Verifies canceling the confirmation dialog does not delete the client and the profile remains accessible.

steps.description: Click the first client in the client list
Click the "Cancel" button in the confirmation modal

title: Unauthorized deletion attempt shows permission denied message and does not remove client
description: Verifies that if the user lacks permissions, confirming deletion shows a permission denied message and the client remains accessible.

steps.description: Click the first client in the client list
Click the "Confirm" button in the confirmation modal

title: Directory list loads and remains usable after scrolling through clients
description: Verifies the client list is visible and usable when the user scrolls through the Directory list.

steps.description: Verify a client list/table is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the client list
Verify the client list/table is visible

title: Create a new template and verify it appears in the template list
description: Verifies a user can create and save a new template from the dashboard and see it listed afterward.

title: Save a template with title and body and verify it is visible in the list
description: Verifies the template form accepts a title and body, saves successfully, and the saved template is visible in the list.

steps.description: Type "Template E2E Smoke" into the Title field

title: Save a template and confirm the created title is visible in the list view
description: Verifies that after saving a template, the user returns to a list view where the new template title is visible.

steps.description: Type "Template E2E Smoke" into the Title field
Type "Hello, this is a reusable template body." into the Template Body field
Verify text "Template E2E Smoke" is visible

title: Attempt to save a template with missing title and verify validation message
description: Verifies validation prevents saving when the template title is not provided and an error message is shown.

steps.description: Type "Body without title" into the Template Body field
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Attempt to save a template with missing body and verify validation message
description: Verifies validation prevents saving when the template body is not provided and an error message is shown.

steps.description: Type "Title without body" into the Title field
Verify text "Body is required" is visible

title: Open Calendar from dashboard and verify calendar grid is visible
description: Verifies the Calendar module opens from the dashboard and shows a visible calendar grid.

title: Create calendar event without required fields and verify validation error
description: Verifies that attempting to save a calendar event without required fields shows a validation error message.

steps.description: Click a date cell in the calendar grid

title: Cancel calendar event creation and verify calendar remains visible
description: Verifies the user can exit event creation without saving and returns to the calendar view.

steps.description: Click a date cell in the calendar grid
